title: Inst. Heba Othman ELDOKONY

Resume

Lect. Heba Abdelfattah-Othman ELDOKONY graduated from Al-Azhar University, Faculty of Islamic and Arabic Studies in 2004. Throughout her career, she has participated in extensive professional development and training programs specialized in Teaching Arabic as a Foreign Language (TAFL).

She began her professional career as an Arabic instructor at the Qortuba Institute, later continuing her tenure at the Ulu’l El Bab Institute. With nearly a decade of experience in the field of Arabic language instruction for non-native speakers, she has also held administrative responsibilities, serving as the Director of the Children’s Education Department at the Ulu’l El Bab Institute.

Currently, she serves as a Lecturer at the Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, School of Foreign Languages, where she has been a member of the Arabic Preparatory Program faculty since 2013.
